testcase.name: test_stale_access_token_invalidated_after_logout
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration21_minor_fixes.py:178: in test_stale_access_token_invalidated_after_logout stale.cookies.set("access_token", old_access_cookie, domain=None) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/cookies.py:246: in set c = create_cookie(name, value, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/cookies.py:525: in create_cookie result["domain_initial_dot"] = result["domain"].startswith(".") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'startswith'
